title: Cosmetic Lib
body:
# Cosmetic Lib A Library mod that allows players to add cosmetic Clothing using Trinkets and a Jar file. ### How to add a new cosmetic? Use this [ExampleMod](https://github.com/Mlodziak00/CosmeticLibExample) to add in a new clothing, it's got an Example ClothingItem Defined ### Mods using this Library: - [CosmeticAnew](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmeticanew) ## FAQ: - What happened to the Hat/Mask/Small Accessory Plans?

I scappred them, I'm now mostly going to maintain Custom Clothing.

Want to play Minecraft on a private server with friends? How about considering getting a server from BisectHosting? They provide great services!
